title: Mobile Application
description: Abstract base class containing the base properties for Intune mobile apps. Represents the mobileApp resource type from the Microsoft Graph API. Platform-specific app types (iOS, Android, Windows, web) inherit from this base type.

id.description: Key of the entity. This property is read-only.

displayName.description: The admin provided or imported title of the app.

largeIcon.description: The large icon, to be displayed in the app details and used for upload of the icon.

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the app was created.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the app was last modified.

isFeatured.description: The value indicating whether the app is marked as featured by the admin.

publishingState.description: The publishing state for the app. The app cannot be assigned unless published.

categories.description: The list of categories for this app.

assignments.description: The list of group assignments for this mobile app.

MimeContent.description: Contains properties for a generic MIME content.

MobileAppCategory.description: Contains properties for an Intune app category.

displayName.description: The name of the app category.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the category was last modified.

MobileAppAssignment.description: A class containing the properties used for Group Assignment of a Mobile App.

intent.description: The install intent defined by the admin.

@odata.type.description: Type discriminator for the target type.

groupId.description: The group ID that is the target of the assignment.

MobileAppAssignmentSettings.description: Abstract class containing properties used to assign a mobile app to a group.
